name: Slice & Bake Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut four 14" x 12-inch pieces of waxed paper or plastic wrap.
2. In a bowl, cream together butter or margarine, sugar, and brown sugar until smooth.
3. Beat in vanilla and eggs until light and fluffy.
4. In another bowl, combine dry ingredients (flour, salt, baking soda).
5. Stir the flour mixture into the egg mixture until well blended.
6. Add chocolate chips and nuts; mix until just combined.
7. Divide dough into 4 pieces. Shape each piece into an 8 to 10 inch roll.
8. Wrap rolls in waxed paper or plastic wrap.
9. Place wrapped rolls in a freezer container with a tight-fitting lid, or wrap airtight in foil.
10. Label and date the container. Store in the freezer for up to 6 months.
To make cookies:
1. Slightly thaw one roll of dough.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F.
3. Cut the thawed dough into slices or chunks.
4. Arrange pieces on an ungreased baking sheet about 1 1/2 inches apart.
5. Bake for 10 minutes, or until edges are browned.
6. Remove from oven and cool.
